info.name: Sliders & Home Pages API
info.description: Postman collection for Sliders and Home Pages API endpoints. All endpoints are public and don't require authentication.

item.name: Sliders

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

query.description: Number of items per page (optional, default: 15)

request.description:
Get all sliders with pagination.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- `per_page`: Number of items per page (default: 15)

**Response includes:**
- Paginated list of sliders
- Each slider includes: id, title (translated), title_en, title_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Sliders fetched successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "title": "Welcome to City Phone",
            "title_en": "Welcome to City Phone",
            "title_ar": "مرحباً بك في سيتي فون",
            "description": "Discover the latest smartphones and electronics at unbeatable prices.",
            "description_en": "Discover the latest smartphones and electronics at unbeatable prices.",
            "description_ar": "اكتشف أحدث الهواتف الذكية والإلكترونيات بأسعار لا تقبل المنافسة.",
            "image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/sliders/slider-1.jpg",
            "created_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 2,
            "title": "Premium Quality Products",
            "title_en": "Premium Quality Products",
            "title_ar": "منتجات عالية الجودة",
            "description": "Shop from our wide selection of premium quality products with warranty.",
            "description_en": "Shop from our wide selection of premium quality products with warranty.",
            "description_ar": "تسوق من مجموعتنا الواسعة من المنتجات عالية الجودة مع الضمان.",
            "image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/sliders/slider-2.jpg",
            "created_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z"
        }
    ],
    "pagination": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "per_page": 15,
        "total": 3,
        "last_page": 1,
        "from": 1,
        "to": 3
    }
}

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

request.description:
Get a single slider by ID.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): The slider ID

**Response includes:**
- Slider details: id, title (translated), title_en, title_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Slider fetched successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "title": "Welcome to City Phone",
        "title_en": "Welcome to City Phone",
        "title_ar": "مرحباً بك في سيتي فون",
        "description": "Discover the latest smartphones and electronics at unbeatable prices.",
        "description_en": "Discover the latest smartphones and electronics at unbeatable prices.",
        "description_ar": "اكتشف أحدث الهواتف الذكية والإلكترونيات بأسعار لا تقبل المنافسة.",
        "image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/sliders/slider-1.jpg",
        "created_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-12-10T13:59:37.000000Z"
    }
}

item.description: Slider endpoints to get slider information

item.name: Home Page

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

request.description:
Get home page information (single record). Returns the first home page record from the database.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Response includes:**
- Home page details: id, offer_text (translated), offer_text_en, offer_text_ar, offer_images (array), app_title (translated), app_title_en, app_title_ar, app_description (translated), app_description_en, app_description_ar, app_main_image, app_images (array), timestamps

**Note:** If no home page record exists, returns null data with success message.

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Home page information fetched successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "offer_text": "Special Offer! Get up to 50% off on selected items. Limited time only!",
        "offer_text_en": "Special Offer! Get up to 50% off on selected items. Limited time only!",
        "offer_text_ar": "عرض خاص! احصل على خصم يصل إلى 50٪ على المنتجات المحددة. لفترة محدودة فقط!",
        "offer_images": [],
        "app_title": "Download Our Mobile App",
        "app_title_en": "Download Our Mobile App",
        "app_title_ar": "حمّل تطبيقنا للهاتف المحمول",
        "app_description": "Get the best shopping experience on the go. Download our app now and enjoy exclusive deals and faster checkout.",
        "app_description_en": "Get the best shopping experience on the go. Download our app now and enjoy exclusive deals and faster checkout.",
        "app_description_ar": "احصل على أفضل تجربة تسوق أثناء التنقل. حمّل تطبيقنا الآن واستمتع بعروض حصرية ودفع أسرع.",
        "app_main_image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/app/main-image.jpg",
        "app_images": [],
        "created_at": "2025-12-10T14:19:43.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-12-10T14:19:43.000000Z"
    }
}

response.name: Not Found (No Record)
